description: Integra LifeSciences Holdings Corporation manufactures and sells surgical instruments, neurosurgical, ear, nose, throat, and wound care products for use in neurosurgery, neurocritical care, and otolaryngology. It operates through Codman Specialty Surgical and Tissue Technologies segments. The company offers neurosurgery and neuro critical care products, including tissue ablation equipment, dural repair products, cerebral spinal fluid management devices, intracranial monitoring equipment, and cranial stabilization equipment. It also offers after-market services; surgical headlamps and instrumen
